problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: DNA computing for massively parallel search may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.
